message:
🐛 Use deduplicated clusters across all pages and contexts (#1624)

Several pages and contexts were using raw clusters which includes
duplicate contexts pointing to the same server. This caused inflated
counts and redundant API calls. Fixed in:
- MiniDashboard (PWA widget cluster counts)
- Operators page (cluster stats)
- AI/ML page (LLM-d cluster discovery)
- Nodes page (node/CPU/memory aggregation)
- AlertsContext (alert evaluation and CronJob fetches)

CanIChecker intentionally kept on raw clusters since RBAC checks
are context-specific.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
